name: qodeflow-readfile
title: Read File
description: Performs file system operations such as reading file content, checking file existence, listing directory contents, and getting file info

input.name: method
input.description: The file operation to perform (ReadFile, FileExists, ListDirectory, GetFileInfo)

input.name: filePath
input.description: The path to the file or directory

input.name: encoding
input.description: The file encoding to use when reading (default: utf-8)

output.name: error
output.description: Error message if the operation failed
